title: Caterpillar to move global HQ from Illinois to Texas

title: Caterpillar to move headquarters to Texas from Illinois, another blow to the Chicago area
text: Caterpillar Inc. said Tuesday it will move its global headquarters from Illinois to an existing divisional office in Irving, Texas, in the Dallas-Forth Worth area, in another blow to the Chicago area, which last month lost the Boeing Co. headquarters.

title: Caterpillar to move global headquarters to Texas
text: Caterpillar Inc said on Tuesday it would move its global headquarters to Irving, Texas from its current location in Deerfield, Illinois.

title: Caterpillar to Relocate Global Headquarters to Dallas-Fort Worth Area
text: DEERFIELD, Ill. , June 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) today announced it will move its global headquarters to the company's existing office in Irving, Texas, from its current location in Deerfield, Illinois.

title: Caterpillar stock rallies to pace the Dow's gainers, after divided raised to boost yield above 2%
text: Shares of Caterpillar Inc. CAT, +1.28% rose 1.2% in morning trading Wednesday, to pace the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA, -0.45% gainers, after the maker of construction and mining equipment raised its quarterly dividend by 8.1%. The company said the new dividend of $1.20 a share, up from $1.11 a share, will be payable on Aug. 19 to shareholders of record on July 20.

title: Caterpillar stock rallies to lead the Dow's gainers after analyst boosts price target
text: Shares of Caterpillar Inc. CAT, +0.89% rallied 1.1% in morning trading Friday to buck the selloff in the broader stock market, and enough to pace the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA, -1.04% gainers. Analyst Michael Feniger at BofA Securities reiterated the neutral rating on the construction and mining equipment company (CAT) but raised the stock price target to $224 from $215.

title: Caterpillar's Growth Prospects Look Attractive
text: Caterpillar is experiencing strong demand across its portfolio, and this momentum is expected to continue for the remainder of 2022. The pricing increases should start getting reflected in the company's margins in the second half of 2022.

title: Cuthbert Is Free And Back As Aldi And M&S Settle Caterpillar Wars
text: In one of the U.K.'s most entertaining legal cases, German discounter Aldi has announced the return date for its popular Cuthbert the Caterpillar cake after a legal battle with Marks & Spencer was settled.
